code: import React,{useEffect,useState}from'react';import api from'../api';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const AdminDashboard=()=>{const[users,setUsers]=useState([]);const[products,setProducts]=useState([]);useEffect(()=>{const loadData=async()=>{try{const usersRes=await api.get('/admin/users');const productsRes=await api.get('/admin/products');setUsers(usersRes.data);setProducts(productsRes.data);}catch(err){console.error(err);}};loadData();},[]);const toggleBlock=async(userId,blocked)=>{try{await api.put(`/admin/users/${userId}/${blocked?'unblock':'block'}`);setUsers(users.map(u=>u.id===userId?{...u,blocked:!blocked}:u));}catch(err){console.error(err);}};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h2",{children:"Admin Dashboard"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h3",{children:"Users"}),users.map(u=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{style:{border:'1px solid #ccc',marginBottom:8,padding:8},children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("p",{children:[u.name," (",u.email,") - ",u.role," - ",u.blocked?'Blocked':'Active']}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{onClick:()=>toggleBlock(u.id,u.blocked),children:u.blocked?'Unblock':'Block'})]},u.id)),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h3",{children:"Products"}),products.map(p=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{style:{border:'1px solid #ccc',marginBottom:8,padding:8},children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("p",{children:[p.title," by ",p.sellerName]})},p.id))]});};export default AdminDashboard;
